title: Crescent (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''Crescent''' was the designation of a group of five [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]-operated [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that was tasked with carrying personnel during the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They evacuated the base alongside [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|Freighter Group]] ''[[Dobll]]'', which was destroyed while attempting to flee the system. During their escape attempt they came under attack by [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] launched by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]''. However, [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] managed to repel the Imperials until the corvettes were able to make the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
